title: ホントの“帝王”になるために！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has a Twinkle Series race coming up this weekend,
which gives me an idea...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What, you want me to go see Prez race?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Normally I wouldn't miss it for the world, but... Now, I dunno.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No, wait... Mm...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She'll win again, just like she always does. And everyone will cheer for
her, like they always do.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If I see her again... the same Prez who's always inspired me, will this
weird stinging in my chest go away?
choice_data_list: Why don't we go find out together?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay. Yeah, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The weekend arrives before long, and with it, Symboli Rudolf's race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowd roars in excitement.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf in the lead! Rudolf's fast, too fast! Three lengths, now
four, the gap keeps widening!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Symboli Rudolf crosses the finish! Such dominance! Ladies and
gentlemen, your emperor, Symboli Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: All hail the emperor!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well... She's amazing, obviously. She's strong, and fast, and the
coolest runner ever.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I need to tell her something. Will you come with me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Excuse us!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh hello, Teio. And our trainer friend, too.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised. Usually, you burst right in, a veritable ball of energy.
I've never known you to give the door a proper knock.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well... I'm here to talk about something serious this time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: All right... Let's hear it, then.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez, you're my role model. You're the coolest racer ever, and
everything I could ever dream to be.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I saw people praise how incredible you are, it would make
me happy too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I saw you standing before a cheering crowd with a smile, it
would make me excited too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But not anymore... Or at least, that's not the only feeling I get now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh? Care to elaborate, Teio?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: When I lost our race, and saw you in front of that cheering crowd...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I... I got this really, really painful ache in my chest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: An ache?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It stung so bad, and I just wanted to scream, so I tried to run off
all those feelings... But they didn't go away.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Weird, I know. It makes no sense. But after seeing you win today, I
get it now.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I... I want to be the number one racer. That's why I run.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So all those cheers... I don't want to give those up to anyone. Anyone.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I want them all for myself. I can't let anyone else take them, not even
you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I want to be like you, Prez. That hasn't changed. You're still my role
model.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But who I really want to become... is someone even you'll recognize as the best, someone even you'll want to cheer for.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Which brings me, Prez, to the super serious part! I'm here to declare
war!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then leave nothing unsaid, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Right... One day, I'm going to become the king of kings, a Monarch to
surpass even the almighty Emperor!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So you better watch out, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So you leave the stands, and take to the turf... to join me on the same
stage. I am glad, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But Symboli Rudolf will not cede her throne so easily. You have a
long road ahead of you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Tokai Teio nod with all her usual energy puts a smile on
Symboli Rudolf's face.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whew, I said it. I really said it! Hehe, my heart's still pounding.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Thanks for being there for me. Also, um... Just, thanks a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And... Let's kick some butt together, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, don't make me spell it out! You'll need to be sharper than that
to be my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget who we're trying to beat—Prez, the strongest racer ever.
So get your act together, Trainer!
choice_data_list: W-will do! We'll both give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yep! All right, now I've made my declaration, and I've got a trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Here begins the legend of the invincible Teio!
